name: Qusar
description: Qusar serves as the gateway to Azerbaijan's premier mountain resort destination. This charming town provides access to the world‑class Shahdag Mountain Resort, offering exceptional skiing in winter and hiking in summer. The surrounding region features stunning natural landscapes, including the breathtaking Laza Waterfalls and traditional Lezgin villages that preserve centuries‑old mountain culture and hospitality.

tips: Visit during December‑March (skiing), June‑August (hiking) for the best weather.
Carry local currency (AZN) as some places may not accept cards.
Respect local customs and dress modestly when visiting religious sites.
touristMistakes: Not allocating enough time to explore the surrounding region.
Overlooking local cuisine and sticking to familiar foods.
Assuming all attractions are within walking distance – plan transportation.
hiddenGems: Scenic viewpoints outside the main tourist areas.
Traditional workshops where you can see crafts being made.
content.howToGetThere: From Baku: 180 km via Car. The journey takes approximately 4 hours by road.
